usageNotes: The note pyramids describe the original inspiration references researched online; they do not prove that a supplier oil contains or reproduces every listed note.
Before customer publication, compare the exact Parfum Plus or Parfex oil against the supplier's own note sheet and documentation.
Keep the customer-facing fragrance number stable even if the supplier or oil version changes.
Do not use original brand names on the customer's finished product, packaging or regulatory label.
Top, heart and base notes describe the original inspiration reference. Replace or supplement them with supplier-confirmed notes after the exact Parfum Plus or Parfex oil is selected.
Do not set activeSupplierVariantId until the oil has passed olfactive, alcohol-solubility, stability and document review.
F203 is provisionally mapped to Miss Dior Blooming Bouquet (2014 profile); keep its inspiration hidden until the supplier confirms the exact reference.
